headline: Fluoride in Public Water Supply Covers Only 78% of Population
context: Water fluoridation programs remain incomplete with 22% of Malaysians drinking non-fluoridated water.

cards.big: 22% of Malaysians or 7.3 million people lack fluoridated water supply as of 2025
cards.sub: Non-fluoridated areas show 34% higher rates of childhood dental cavities

cards.big: Sabah and Kelantan have the lowest fluoridation coverage at 42% and 55% respectively
cards.sub: State-level resistance and infrastructure limitations prevent full implementation

cards.big: CDC names water fluoridation one of 10 great public health achievements of the 20th century
cards.sub: Evidence base for dental health benefits of fluoridation spans 75 years of research

cards.big: Australia achieves 89% water fluoridation coverage through state-level mandatory policies
cards.sub: Legislative mandate overcomes local opposition to evidence-based public health measure

cards.big: Communities without fluoridated water pay the difference in children's dental suffering
Should water fluoridation be mandated nationally rather than left to state discretion
